description: 191 - 23-04-2025 - Emails between Peter Mandelson, Ed Llewellyn (former HM Ambassador to Italy, FCDO) and others
text:
Italy, FCDO) and others

From: Ed Llewellyn Personal

Sent: Wed 23/04/2025 12:26:26 PM (UTC)

To: Jonathan Powell Personal |; Peter
Mandelson! Personal ]; Ailsa Terry
(No.10)I Personal 1: Michael
Ellam[ Personal ]

Ge: JCS | Personal ]

Subject: RE: LIMDIS: Meloni in US/Vance in Rome

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - RECIPIENTS ONLY

A couple of updates from here:

+ Potus now arriving around 2100 on Friday evening, not in the morning, ***

Ed
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - RECIPIENTS ONLY

From: Ed Llewellyn
Sent: 22 April 2025 23:03
To: Jonathan Powell ; Peter Mandelson ; Ailsa Terry (No.10) : Michael Ellam
Ce:
Subject: Re: LIMDIS: Meloni in US/Vance in Rome

Ailsa
wee

Adding Michael to this - apologies, Michael; should have included you first time round.
Ed
Sent from Outlook for iOS

From: Ailsa Terry

Sent: Tuesday, April 22, 2025 10:44 PM

To: Jonathan Powell ; Ed Llewellyn ; Peter Mandelson
Ce:

Subject: RE: LIMDIS: Meloni in US/Vance in Rome

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

Very much so. 
 
 
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
From: Jonathan Powell 
Sent: 22 April 2025 21:43
To: Ed Llewellyn ; Ailsa Terry ; Peter Mandelson 
Cc: 
 
Subject: Re: LIMDIS: Meloni in US/Vance in Rome
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
Ed
Thanks. Very helpful
Jonathan
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
